scores.correctness_notes: Covers all supported bases and architectures correctly, correctly explains omitting top-level base for multi-base builds, shows long-form platform entries matching gold standard. Omits the shorthand multi-base form (ubuntu@22.04:amd64:) but this is a minor omission — all key concepts are accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — charmcraft pack --platform and CRAFT_PLATFORM env var are real craft-tools conventions; the note about interim releases requiring build-base and the cross-base constraint are plausible real details, not fabricated
